docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUCA RESTAURANTS 2, INC. SERVED JUN-05-2013, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT MITHOEFER, JOSHUA T.
